name: prompt-engineering-expert
tagline: ClawHub (92★): Advanced expert in prompt engineering, custom instructions design, and prompt optimization for AI agents
verdict: The entire skill is a bulleted list of capability labels - not one concrete step, command, file target, or decision rule anywhere, and no stated output format or deliverable either. An agent invoking this gets nothing actionable, and with no scope boundaries it can misfire on any adjacent request.

highlights.summary: The entire body is a bulleted list of capability/use-case labels; there is not one concrete step, command, file target, or decision criterion anywhere.
No stated deliverable, format, file, or response shape anywhere — only a description of expertise areas.
